name: sn-glycero-3-phosphoethan… to di-μ-sulfido-diiron
summary: A 9-step route from sn-glycero-3-phosphoethanolamine to di-μ-sulfido-diiron(2+), ingested from Rhea. Every step is curated by Rhea and independently verified here to balance in mass and charge.

reactions.name: long-chain fatty acid adenylase/transferase FadD23
reactions.equation: holo-[(hydroxy)phthioceranic acid synthase] + hexadecanoate + ATP = hexadecanoyl-[(hydroxy)phthioceranic acid synthase] + AMP + diphosphate

reactions.name: acyl-[acyl-carrier-protein] 4-desaturase
reactions.equation: hexadecanoyl-[ACP] + 2 reduced [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + O2 + 2 H(+) = (4Z)-hexadecenoyl-[ACP] + 2 oxidized [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + 2 H2O
